scripts.start:subgraphs: concurrently --names "vehicles,home,recipes,projects" "pnpm -C ../gql-vehicles run start:dev" "pnpm -C ../gql-home run start:dev" "pnpm -C ../gql-recipes run start:dev" "pnpm -C ../gql-projects run start:dev"
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:subgraphs" "wait-on tcp:4001 tcp:4002 tcp:4003 tcp:4004 && npm run compose && npm run start:router"
